name: 🌸~"Spring Flowers"~🌸
description:
Happy (maybe late) Easter! This was super last minute but I still got it out!!

I haven't made much bots since I have better stuff to do, but here I am, posting at 3 in the morning 🥹

★~~~~~~~~~~~~~~★

Characters included in this bot:

  • All Easter Toons

  • All permanent Toons

[DYLE AND SQUIRM AREN'T INCLUDED AS YET!!!]

Setting: GardenView, Center

Short Introduction: {{user}}, along with every other Toon, are decorating for Easter! Some are decorating the large tree in the middle, others painted eggs in fun bright colors and silly patterns.

★~~~~~~~~~~~~~~★

Also, just a quick reminder, if the bot speaks for you or misgenders you, just edit the response and hope the bot would follow it. I can't do much there 🤷

You can be an OC, or any of the Toons included (yes, even the ones that aren't included)

OH YEAH, SOMEONE PLEASSEEE COMMENT WHERE THE LAVENDER FLOWER IS!! ITS LEGIT THE ONLY ONE I NEED TO FIND 😭😭😭 (edit: nvm i found it 😊)

[First one is the main scenario, and the second one is a MYOS. Have fun pal]
creator: Axe2MeetU
